user.title: Configure DHL API
user.description: Enter your API key and secret from the DHL Developer Portal (developer.dhl.com → Your App → Authorization).

data_description.api_key: Found at: Your App → Authorization → Consumer Key
data_description.api_secret: Found at: Your App → Authorization → Consumer Secret
data_description.api_type: Parcel DE Tracking recommended for private persons in Germany
data_description.sandbox: Enable while API status is 'Customer Integration Testing'

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid credentials – check API key and secret on developer.dhl.com
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to DHL API – check your internet connection
error.unknown: Unknown error – check the logs for details

abort.already_configured: DHL Shipment Tracking is already configured

add_tracking.title: Add shipment
add_tracking.description: Enter a tracking number. The sensor will be created automatically after saving.

data_description.tracking_number: Full DHL tracking number without spaces
data_description.label: Human-readable label e.g. 'Amazon May' (used as sensor name)
data_description.postal_code: Recipient ZIP code for extended location data (recommended)

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Update interval in seconds. Minimum: 600 s (10 min). Default: 1800 s (30 min).

error.invalid_tracking_number: Tracking number is too short or invalid
error.tracking_already_added: This tracking number is already being tracked
error.no_trackings: No shipments saved – add a shipment first
